entity.label: Pethahiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A descendant of Judah who had some office at the court of Persia (Neh. 11:24).

nodes.label: Pethahiah
nodes.description: A descendant of Judah who had some office at the court of Persia (Neh. 11:24).

verses.text: And Pethahiah the son of Meshezabeel, of the children of Zerah the son of Judah, was at the king’s hand in all matters concerning the people.
